22.reason: Condition should be >= to allow duplicate keys to be inserted to right child

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Condition should be >= to allow duplicate keys to be inserted to right child
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This condition should be `else` or `else if(item>=p->data)` because equal values must be inserted into the right subtree to match the problem specification (right child >= root).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The condition should be item >= p->data to handle duplicates correctly as per problem description (right child is greater than or equal). Currently, duplicate items are ignored, causing missing leaf nodes.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The condition should be item >= p->data to handle duplicates correctly as per problem description (right child >= root). Currently, duplicates are ignored, causing missing leaf nodes.
